title: Dekton 7" Straight Jaw Locking Plier-180mm Quick Release Lever With Adjustable Screw| Hardened, Tempered Steel| Precision Milled Teeth| Ideal For Tightening, Gripping, Bending|Ergonomic Handle control
features: Quick-Release Lever for Effortless Operation: Featuring an easy-to-use quick-release lever, these long-nose locking pliers of 7" and 180 mm that ensure a secure grip and swift release with minimal effort. Perfect for professional and DIY tasks, it allows for smooth, one-handed operation, making it ideal for various applications like tightening, bending, and gripping.

Adjustable Screw for Precise Control: Equipped with an adjustable screw mechanism, this tool offers customizable tension to adapt to different grip sizes and materials. Whether you're working with delicate or sturdy materials, the pliers can be adjusted for optimal holding power, ensuring precision and control in any task.

Durable Hardened and Tempered Steel Construction: Built with high-quality hardened and tempered steel, these pliers are designed to withstand heavy-duty use. The robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, making them an essential tool for professionals and enthusiasts working in demanding environments.

Precision Milled Teeth for Secure Gripping: The pliers' jaws are designed with precision-milled teeth, offering exceptional grip and control. Whether you're working with nuts, bolts, or small objects, the sharp teeth provide enhanced contact for secure handling and reduced slippage, making it an ideal tool for mechanical, electrical, and general household tasks.

Ergonomic Handle for Maximum Comfort and Control: The ergonomic design of the handle ensures a comfortable grip, reducing hand strain during prolonged use. Its non-slip texture provides added control, allowing you to apply the right amount of force with ease, making the tool both effective and comfortable for extended tasks.
description: The Dekton 7" Straight Jaw Locking Plier is expertly engineered for precision, durability, and ease of use. Constructed from hardened and tempered steel, these pliers offer exceptional strength and long-lasting performance, making them ideal for a wide range of tasks, from tightening and gripping to bending and manipulating hard-to-reach objects. The precision milled teeth ensure a secure grip, whether you're working with delicate materials or rugged components. This tool’s design incorporates an adjustable screw that allows you to modify the jaw capacity effortlessly, providing optimal control over different sizes of objects. One of the standout features of this plier is its quick-release lever, which simplifies the process of locking and unlocking the grip, enhancing efficiency during tasks that require frequent adjustments. The long nose design is perfect for reaching into narrow spaces, making it a must-have tool for mechanics, DIY enthusiasts, and professionals in various trades. For maximum comfort and control, the ergonomic handle is designed to reduce hand fatigue, allowing you to work for extended periods without discomfort. The non-slip grip ensures a secure hold even in slippery conditions, enhancing safety and precision. With its robust construction and thoughtful design, the Dekton 7" Straight Jaw Locking Plier is a reliable and versatile addition to any toolbox, delivering superior performance and durability that you can depend on for years to come.
